name: Power Shift Arena
description: Power Shift Arena is a fast-paced arena action game that tests your reflexes and decision-making skills. Control a powerful energy core trapped in the center of a neon arena while enemies attack from all directions. You don’t attack manually — instead, you shift the power direction of the core to release automatic energy pulses and eliminate incoming threats. Choose between Easy, Medium, and Hard modes, each offering unique challenge levels and faster enemy waves. Survive as long as possible, destroy enemies efficiently, and chase high scores in this intense, skill-based arcade experience.
instructions: Rotate the power direction of your core to destroy incoming enemies Energy pulses fire automatically but choosing the right direction at the right time is critical Survive waves avoid hits and set new high scores
